Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-16 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows two exceptionally strong short-term momentum candidates, with TNGX dominating the rankings at #1 with a composite score of 98.2. TNGX displays extraordinary returns across all timeframes, particularly a 867.27% one-year return and 175.52% six-month return, while maintaining perfect positioning above all major moving averages and passing all ratio consistency tests. CENX ranks as the second-highest scorer with more moderate but still impressive metrics—192.81% one-year return and 117.73% six-month return—though it shows notably lower volatility (vol_ratio 0.673 vs typical ranges) and weaker outperformance versus benchmark indices. Both tickers pass all SMA gates and maintain strong ratio consistency, suggesting sustained rather than flash momentum, though TNGX's 845.75% outperformance versus SPY over one year and 8.4 bad-day resilience score indicate truly exceptional relative strength during market stress. The thin trading volumes on both positions ("thin" vol_flag) warrant caution regarding position sizing despite their compelling momentum scores.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
